examples: Karen tried to swim after him but the strong undercurrent swept them apart.
I detect an undercurrent of resentment towards the new proposals.
This is the undercurrent of conversation at Einstein memorial meetings throughout the year.
There's always been an undercurrent in this country that if you're poor, it's your fault.
Peeps, tweets and staccato whistles fill the air, a pulsing undercurrent in the tropical night.
